mission: Re-apply cycle-13 owed lean4 mechanical conversion of axiom_felgner_step2a_Vkappa_Replacement and axiom_felgner_step2c_Vkappa_Choice. Cycle 13 committed the proposal but never applied the corresponding Foundation/Axioms.lean code change to HEAD; cycle 14 axis-K audit caught the divergence (claim 17 axioms vs HEAD 19 actual). Cycle 16 closes the anomaly.
